summary: VenuLock branding migration testing complete. All 12 features tested PASS. Verified: (1) Landing page header shows 'VenuLock' logo, (2) Hero shows 'WE TALK. YOU LOCK.' tagline badge, (3) Footer shows VenuLock brand and tagline, (4) Copyright shows 'VenuLock', (5) Venue search header shows VenuLock, (6) Venue cards show 'VL VERIFIED' badge, (7) Login page shows VenuLock branding with @venulock.in credentials, (8) Page title is 'VenuLock | WE TALK. YOU LOCK.', (9) No 'BookMyVenue' text found on any page, (10) Footer links all work, (11) Top performers section loads with data, (12) Connect button works with dropdown options.
critical_code_review_comments: Branding migration complete - all 'BookMyVenue' text replaced with 'VenuLock'
Color palette successfully updated: gold #C7A14A/#C9A227 -> #F5C84C, navy #0B1F3B/#0A1A2F -> #111111
Font change to Poppins/Montserrat confirmed in index.css
Tagline 'WE TALK. YOU LOCK.' visible in header badge, hero, and footer
VL VERIFIED badges showing correctly on venue cards (not BMV VERIFIED)
Logo component properly implemented with gold pin icon + Venu/Lock text
Mobile view branding consistent with desktop
context_for_next_testing_agent: VenuLock branding migration complete. Key changes: (1) Text: BookMyVenue -> VenuLock, BMV -> VL, (2) Colors: gold #F5C84C, dark #111111, (3) Font: Poppins/Montserrat, (4) Tagline: 'WE TALK. YOU LOCK.' visible in hero badge and footer, (5) Email domains: @venulock.in. Logo component at /app/frontend/src/components/Logo.js uses SVG gold pin icon. All footer links functional. Connect button with WhatsApp/Phone dropdown working.
